2606.11078.title: A History-Aware Visually Grounded Critic for Computer Use Agents
2606.11078.paper_summary: Various test-time interventions for Computer Use Agents (CUAs), including critic models, have been developed to improve performance through pre-execution action evaluation in complex Graphical User Interface (GUI) environments. However, existing critics suffer from two key limitations: they (1) focus primarily on short-sighted decision loops (e.g., forgetting earlier actions) and (2) lack the visual grounding needed to detect flawed actions (e.g., clicking wrong UI elements). To address these, we introduce HiViG, a History-aware Visually Grounded test-time framework, built around a multimodal critic trained on real GUI trajectories to abstract past interactions into a compact record and to evaluate actions with visual grounding. At test time, HiViG integrates the critic into the policy decision loop to provide macro-action history, which summarizes the policy's completed achievements, and visually grounded critique, which verifies raw execution coordinates against the current screenshot to intercept errors before execution. Across web, mobile, and desktop benchmarks, HiViG consistently outperforms existing scalar and verbal critics, improving average success rates over the strongest baseline by 5.8% for Qwen3-VL-32B and 9.0% for Gemini-3-Flash, and demonstrates strong cross-platform generalization. Ablations show that macro-action history mitigates short-sighted planning and visually grounded critique reduces execution errors, with both components being critical for test-time scaling in long-horizon GUI tasks.
2606.11078.paper_summary_zh: 各種針對電腦使用代理（CUAs）的測試時間介入措施，包括批評模型，已被開發出來以通過在複雜的圖形用戶界面（GUI）環境中進行執行前行動評估來提高性能。<lb/>然而，現有的批評者面臨兩個主要限制：（1）主要集中在短視的決策循環（例如，忘記早期行動）上，以及（2）缺乏檢測錯誤行動所需的視覺基礎（例如，點擊錯誤的用戶界面元素）。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們介紹了 HiViG，一個具備歷史感知的視覺基礎測試時間框架，該框架圍繞著一個基於真實 GUI 軌跡訓練的多模態批評者，將過去的互動抽象為一個緊湊的記錄，並以視覺基礎評估行動。<lb/>在測試時間，HiViG 將批評者整合進政策決策循環中，以提供宏觀行動歷史，該歷史總結了政策已完成的成就，並提供視覺基礎的批評，該批評將原始執行坐標與當前截圖進行驗證，以在執行前攔截錯誤。<lb/>在網頁、移動和桌面基準測試中，HiViG 始終超越現有的標量和口頭批評者，對於 Qwen3-VL-32B 提高了 5.8% 的平均成功率，對於 Gemini-3-Flash 提高了 9.0%，並展示了強大的跨平台泛化能力。<lb/>消融實驗顯示，宏觀行動歷史減輕了短視規劃，而視覺基礎的批評減少了執行錯誤，這兩個組件對於長期 GUI 任務的測試時間擴展至關重要。
2606.11078.author: Jaewoo Lee et.al.
2606.11078.authors: Jaewoo Lee, Zaid Khan, Archiki Prasad, Justin Chih-Yao Chen, Supriyo Chakraborty, Kartik Balasubramaniam, Sambit Sahu, Elias Stengel-Eskin, Hyunji Lee, Mohit Bansal
